sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle game; sub-pixel movement not documented

special_mechanics.name: Puyo Fall Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Puyos fall from top of screen in pairs, movable left/right, rotatable 90° clockwise and counter-clockwise. Game over when third column fills to top.

special_mechanics.name: Offsetting (Sousai)
special_mechanics.description: Player can counter and negate Garbage Puyos sent by opponent with chains of their own. Can also send Puyos back to opponent (Garbage overflow).

special_mechanics.name: Rensa Shibari (Chain Restriction)
special_mechanics.description: Custom rule causing chains with fewer than set number of steps to score nothing and send no garbage, creating longer matches.

special_mechanics.name: Garbage Types
special_mechanics.description: Standard Garbage, Point Puyos (add points when erased adjacently, enhance chain power short-term), Hard Puyos/Steelies (harder to erase than standard garbage).

tier_notes: Tier 2: Puzzle game with no documented physics movement parameters. Available source is Wikipedia gameplay overview focusing on game rules and modes rather than physics implementation. No player character movement, jump mechanics, gravity, or sub-pixel data applicable.
